'''âj-w-l-th''' ('''kajawlethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberband|rubberband]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberband|rubberband]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-w-l-th
|-
! Lemma
| kajawlethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijawlethoko|thijawlethoko]] || [[word:jijawlethoko|jijawlethoko]] || [[word:shijawlethoko|shijawlethoko]] || [[word:kijawlethoko|kijawlethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujawlethoko|thuthujawlethoko]] || [[word:jujujawlethoko|jujujawlethoko]] || [[word:shushujawlethoko|shushujawlethoko]] || [[word:kukujawlethoko|kukujawlethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujawlethoko|thujawlethoko]] || [[word:jujawlethoko|jujawlethoko]] || [[word:shujawlethoko|shujawlethoko]] || [[word:kujawlethoko|kujawlethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojawlethoko|thojawlethoko]] || [[word:jojawlethoko|jojawlethoko]] || [[word:shojawlethoko|shojawlethoko]] || [[word:kojawlethoko|kojawlethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojawlethoko|thojawlethoko]] || [[word:jojawlethoko|jojawlethoko]] || [[word:shojawlethoko|shojawlethoko]] || [[word:kojawlethoko|kojawlethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjawlethoko|thĂŠjawlethoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjawlethoko|jĂŠjawlethoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjawlethoko|shĂŠjawlethoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjawlethoko|kĂŠjawlethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajawlethoko|thathajawlethoko]] || [[word:jajajawlethoko|jajajawlethoko]] || [[word:shashajawlethoko|shashajawlethoko]] || [[word:kakajawlethoko|kakajawlethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajawlethoko|thajawlethoko]] || [[word:jajawlethoko|jajawlethoko]] || [[word:shajawlethoko|shajawlethoko]] || [[word:kajawlethoko|kajawlethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajawlethoko|thajawlethoko]] || [[word:jajawlethoko|jajawlethoko]] || [[word:shajawlethoko|shajawlethoko]] || [[word:kajawlethoko|kajawlethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
